name: sylvinajtool
description: Standalone Tauri NUI editor for Rappelz.
author: Sylvina Team

scripts.start: npm run build:icon && npm run build && node tools/run-cargo.js run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:rust
scripts.lint:rust: node tools/run-cargo.js fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all --check && node tools/run-cargo.js clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:icon && npm run build && node tools/run-cargo.js build --release --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && node tools/copy-tauri-artifact.js
